title: Trick A Rock Into Thinking
description:
If you haven't seen this step coming, you should see a doctor. Make yourself an inscriber and put the ALU, Control Unit, and another Electrum Sheet together to make the Rudimentary Processor.

Once again I am asking for you to make this an automation because you will need more of them.
description_completed: Congrats! The Kinetic Era is Complete! Time to move on to even more complex circuits in: The Mekanised Era!.
